    Index

    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    G

    gameGUI - package gameGUI
     
    getAngle() - Method in class car.Car
    Returns the car's current orientation angle.
    getAngle() - Method in class car.VelocityVector
    Returns the direction (angle) of the vector in radians.
    getCheckpointCooldown() - Method in class car.Car
    Returns checkpoint cooldown state.
    getCheckPointCount() - Method in class car.Car
    Returns number of checkpoints crossed.
    getCheckpointGroupNum(int, int) - Method in class track.Track
    References CheckPointGroups method of returning a checkpoints group number
    getCols() - Method in class track.Track
    Getter for track columns
    getCurrentTile(int, int) - Method in class track.Track
    This function may not be used but might later, returns a specific tile
    getCurrentTime() - Method in class car.Car
    Returns current elapsed race time.
    getGroupNumber(int, int) - Method in class track.CheckPointGroups
    Returns the group number of the checkpoint tile at xPos yPos, or -1 if the Tile is not a mapped checkpoint
    getLap() - Method in class car.Car
    Returns the current lap count.
    getMagnitude() - Method in class car.VelocityVector
    Calculates the magnitude (length) of the vector.
    getNumCheckpoints() - Method in class track.Track
    Getter for the number of track checkpoints
    getPos() - Method in class car.Car
    Returns current position of car.
    getPreferredSize() - Method in class track.TrackPanel
    This is used so the track will show fully without having to use magic numbers due to window sizing
    getRaceTime() - Method in class car.Car
    Returns total race time.
    getRows() - Method in class track.Track
    Getter for track rows
    getSpecificTile(int, int) - Method in class track.Track
    This fucntion is used in TrackDrawerGUI to write the tile's char to the file
    getSurface() - Method in class track.Tile
    Getter for Surface enumeration of tile
    getTileColor() - Method in class track.Tile
    Getter for tile color
    getTileSize() - Static method in class track.Tile
    This method is static so I can access it without initializing a tile for GUI purposes
    getTileType() - Method in class track.Tile
    Getter for the Tile's tileType
    getXComp() - Method in class car.VelocityVector
    Returns the x-component of the vector.
    getXPos() - Method in class track.Tile
    Get the X position of the Tile in the track
    getYComp() - Method in class car.VelocityVector
    Returns the y-component of the vector.
    getYPos() - Method in class track.Tile
    Get the Y position of the Tile in the track
    GRASS - Enum constant in enum class track.Tile.Surface
     
    grip - Variable in enum class track.Tile.Surface
